scope_note: QA Pythagorean Formal Proof Statements cert [355]. Primary source: Iverson, B. (1993) Pythagorean Arithmetic Vol I Chapter IX pp.94-100. Text: 13 numbered formal proof statements. (C1) Statement 1: exactly one of (d,e) is even. (C2) Statement 4: factor 3 in every bead set; proof via all 9 tri-residue combinations. (C3) Statement 8: C=2de divisible by 4 (4-par). (C4) Statement 9: CF/2 (area) divisible by 6; proof 12|CF from 4|C and 3|(C or F). (C5) Statement 13: G-C=b^2 (odd perfect square); proof G-C=(d-e)^2=b^2. DOI: primary text, no external DOI.
